findings.finding: Failed §4.3 members must remain public and cannot enter the controlling union.
findings.disposition: Validation records retain every failure and the executed union contains only survivors.

findings.finding: Registrar execution must precede Schedule A and every later instrument.
findings.disposition: Issuance hold runs through the 2294-01-10 signed execution certification.

findings.finding: Lower certificate must issue after Schedule A.
findings.disposition: Sequencing hold placed on Lower publication.
